description.ko: 공중의 투명한 광학 회로가 흰 에너지를 유리관과 막 사이로 엮어 빠른 무지개 카스틱으로 굴절시킨다.
description.en: A bright airborne optical circuit weaves white energy through glass tubes and membranes, refracting it into fast rainbow caustics.

prompt: PRISM-2 spectral loom: in a radiant white volume, a suspended grid of ultra-clear glass capillary tubes, tiny square apertures, and thin liquid-crystal membranes forms an airborne optical circuit rather than a traditional prism. Rapid white photon threads weave through the tubes at sharp angles, then scatter through the membranes into braided dispersion bands of #FF0080 magenta, #00FF80 mint, #8000FF violet, and #FFFF00 yellow. The refracted energy draws flickering barcode caustics, concentric rainbow ripples, and split-second chromatic fringes around every curved tube rim and aperture corner. Bright pure-energy mood, fast spectral motion, polished refraction clarity, crisp internal reflections, very few suspended particles, clean luminous atmosphere, no tabletop prism or dark macro setup.
